name: Memphis
description: Showroom doodles straight out of 1986 — outlined rings, solid half-rounds and tipped frames jostle on cream, reshuffling with every redraw.

code.style: --ring: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color5)); --half: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5), var(--color1)); --flip: @p(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(16%, 28%); border: calc(55px / @Y) solid var(--ring); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 500ms; } } @random(0.45) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 18%; top: 30%; width: 64%; height: 32%; border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; background: var(--half); transform: rotate(var(--flip)); transition: ease 500ms; } } @random(0.16) { border: calc(40px / @Y) solid var(--color1); box-sizing: border-box; transform: rotate(@rand(-10deg, 10deg)); } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
